---
title: wordSearchJS
subtitle: A Javascript library to add Word Search Tasks to online and offline experiments.
description: A Javascript library to add Word Search Tasks to online and offline experiments.
title-block-banner: featured.png
---

<div class="software-links" style="margin-bottom: 1.5em;">
<a href="https://github.com/QuentinAndre/WordSearchJS" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">See on GitHub</a>
<a href="https://codepen.io/QuentinAndre/full/rQLejK/" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">See on CodePen</a>
</div>

This library was adapted from [Robert J. Calin-Jageman's word search task](https://calin-jageman.net/lab/word_search/), 
with added functionality to facilitate Qualtrics integration.

To find out how to use the library in your own research, <a href="https://github.com/QuentinAndre/WordSearchJS" target="_blank">visit the github repository.</a>
